summary: Iteration 147: Self-healing operations loop - All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Pattern Intelligence panel verified working with assign/ack buttons on notifications and dismiss buttons on recurring issues. Fixed syntax errors in HousekeepingCommandDashboard.tsx and EngineeringCommandDashboard.tsx (missing function definitions after useLiveEvents calls, missing RefreshCw import).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: HousekeepingCommandDashboard.tsx line 78 - useLiveEvents call was merged with runAutoAssign function definition. Separated into proper statements.
FIXED: EngineeringCommandDashboard.tsx line 68 - useLiveEvents call was merged with sevColor function definition. Separated into proper statements.
FIXED: EngineeringCommandDashboard.tsx - Added missing RefreshCw import from lucide-react.
VERIFIED: POST /api/concierge/team-notifications/{id}/assign creates downstream task in correct domain queue based on DOMAIN_FROM_ROLE mapping
VERIFIED: POST /api/patterns/dismiss creates pattern_dismissals row, GET /api/patterns/recurring-issues excludes dismissed patterns
VERIFIED: POST /api/patterns/stratus-recommendations auto-creates preventive work orders (PM-YYMMDD-XXXX) for 3+ recurrence patterns
VERIFIED: stratus-recommendations still creates team_notifications for HIGH-priority plans (iter146 regression fix intact)
VERIFIED: event_bus.publish for stratus.remediations.generated does not crash (event_bus is optional)
VERIFIED: Pattern Intelligence panel shows both 'assign' (blue) and 'ack' (green) buttons on unacknowledged notifications
VERIFIED: Recurring Issues section shows dismiss buttons (✓) on each row

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 147 adds self-healing operations loop: (1) POST /api/concierge/team-notifications/{id}/assign creates downstream task in owner domain queue using DOMAIN_FROM_ROLE mapping in concierge_hub.py lines 619-630, (2) POST /api/patterns/dismiss + GET /api/patterns/dismissals + DELETE /api/patterns/dismissals/{room_no}/{category} for pattern dismissal in patterns.py lines 600-645, (3) stratus-recommendations auto-creates preventive work orders (PM-YYMMDD-XXXX) for 3+ recurrence patterns in patterns.py lines 417-463. Frontend PatternIntelligencePanel.tsx has assignNotif() and dismissPattern() functions with data-testid attributes for testing. Fixed syntax errors in HousekeepingCommandDashboard.tsx and EngineeringCommandDashboard.tsx where useLiveEvents calls were incorrectly merged with function definitions.
